name: Touhou RPG
description:
!Proxies only!

Includes: Detailed descriptions of characters, locations, small lore bits and other details to make it immersive, and... I mean, just look at this token count. 😐

I was working on this bot for a long time and obviously, it wasn't working with JLLM at all. And so i've thought "Hm... maybe in the future there will be an LLM with bigger context size? I'll put this bot away for later." And then, Deepseek appeared. And no, i didn't simply copypasted Touhou wiki (in case if you were wondering). I took info from there, yes, because... where else i should've get it from? But i did not just copypasted whole pages as-is without any changes. Character dialogue in games and official print works are also great sources.

As for characters in this bot it's pretty much all of them, i think? There are (From what i can remember for sure): Reimu Hakurei, Marisa Kirisame, Narumi Yatadera, Remilia Scarlet, Flandre Scarlet, Patchouli Knowledge, Koakuma, Sakuya Izayoi, Hong Meiling, Miyoi Okunoda, Nitori Kawashiro, Kutaka Niwatari, Momoyo Himemushi, Momiji Inubashiri, Shizuha Aki, Minoriko Aki, Son Biten, Sanae Kochiya, Kanako Yasaka, Suwako Moriya, Cirno, Daiyousei, Lily White, Eternity Larva, Fujiwara no Mokou, Kagerou Imaizumi, Kaguya Houraisan, Eirin Yagokoro, Reisen Udongein Inaba, Tewi Inaba, Tsukasa Kudamaki, Yamame Kurodani, Aya Shameimaru, Alice Margatroid, Hatate Himekaidou, Megumu Iizunamaru, Byakuren Hijiri, Shou Toramaru, Nazrin, Ichirin Kumoi, Unzan, Minamitsu Murasa, Kyouko Kasodani, Nue Houjuu, Shinmyoumaru Sukuna, Chimata Tenkyuu, Doremy Sweet, Iku Nagae, Hina Kagiyama, Tenshi Hinanawi, Mamizou Futatsuiwa, Wakasagihime, Joon Yorigami, Shion Yorigami, Mystia Lorelei, Chiyari Tenkajin, Mike Goutokuji, Enoko Mitsugashira, Yachie Kicchou, Saki Kurokoma, Yuuma Toutetsu, Keiki Haniyasushin, Mayumi Joutouguu, Youmu Konpaku, Yuyuko Saigyouji, Letty Whiterock, Medicine Melancholy, Nemuno Sakata, Sannyo Komakusa, Rei'sen, Mizuchi Miyadeguchi, Wriggle Nightbug, Nareko Michigami, Yuiman Asama, Ariya Iwanaga, Nina Watari, Seija Kijin, Keine Kamishirasawa, Sekibanki, Hata no Kokoro, Yuuka Kazami, Parsee Mizuhashi, Yuugi Hoshiguma, Suika Ibuki, Satori Komeiji, Koishi Komeiji, Utsuho Reiuji, Rin Kaenbyou, Zanmu Nippaku, Hisami Yomotsu, Hecatia Lapislazuli, Clownpiece, Junko, Ringo, Seiran, Eika Ebisu, Seiga Kaku, Sagume Kishin, Okina Matara, Mai Teireida, Satono Nishida, Aunn Komano, Komachi Onozuka, Urumi Ushizaki, Yoshika Miyako, Chimi Houjuu, Eiki Shiki Yamaxanadu, Kogasa Tatara, and probably some other characters that i have forgot to mention in this list.Touhou is big, after all.

Man, creating this bot was time consuming...
creator: MisterTwister
